title: logania micrantha
intro: Logania micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Logania micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Logania micrantha can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams for external use.
